alert.title: Multiple services failing - widespread 401 errors
alert.message: 85% of API requests failing. Circuit breakers triggered for user-service, order-service, payment-service. Customer-facing error rate exceeding 80%.

logs: 2024-03-28 16:00:00 [INFO] Deploy v3.2.0 started by ci-pipeline (commit: a1b2c3d)

root_cause.description: Deploy v3.2.0 to auth-service introduced a bug in TokenValidator.validateClaims() that causes NullPointerException, failing all token validations and cascading auth failures to every downstream service
